description_long: This structure is a large, wooden half-pipe with high vertical walls and a flat central platform, resembling a skateboarding ramp rather than a traditional dam. The surface is constructed from light-colored wood panels, with visible seams and reinforced edges. Metal railings run along the top perimeter for safety, and a staircase on one end provides access to the upper platform. The exterior and interior surfaces are decorated with colorful graffiti and murals, adding an urban, artistic flair. There is a large rectangular opening in the central wall, and the overall form is symmetrical with a deep, curved basin.
description: A large, wooden half-pipe structure with metal railings, graffiti art, and a staircase leading to an upper platform.
description_view_0: Side view showing the staircase, upper platform, and a large graffiti tag on the curved wall.
description_view_1: Angled view into the basin, highlighting the curved wooden surface, graffiti on the floor, and the staircase at the far end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing a large mural, the rectangular opening, and the full height of the structure.
description_view_3: Angled view from the other end, focusing on the deep basin, graffiti, and the staircase structure.
